---
output: github_document
---

```{r, results = "asis", echo = FALSE}
library(gifski)
ratio <- 3 # 2210/120
gif_hex <- gifski(
  png_files = list.files("PNG", pattern = "png$", full.names = TRUE), 
  gif_file = "hex-stickers.gif", 
  delay = 1, 
  width = 2210 / ratio,
  height = 2557 / ratio,
  loop = TRUE, 
  progress = FALSE
)
```

# hex-stickers <img src="hex-stickers.gif" align="right" width="120" height="138.84" />

All hex logos as either [PNG](PNG/#readme) or [SVG](SVG/#readme).

All stickers are under with [CC0](LICENSE.md).
